news.headline: TruBridge ranked top by Black Book 2024 for RCM, Highest in Outsourcing for Hospitals Under 100 Beds and Community Hospitals.
news.summary: TruBridge, Inc., a healthcare solutions company listed on NASDAQ under TBRG, was recently recognized in the 2024 Black Book Research user survey. The survey, which gathered input from 6,771 health system leaders, identified TruBridge as a leading provider in End-to-End Revenue Cycle Management (RCM). Additionally, TruBridge was ranked as the top performer in Outsourcing for Hospitals with under 100 beds and in Community Hospital Inpatient Accounting System. The Black Book Research rankings are notable for their comprehensive nature and aim to highlight top performers in the industry.

news.headline: Freeflow Ventures raises $90M for early stage deep tech investments, total assets under management.
news.summary: Freeflow Ventures, a venture capital firm in Pasadena and Berkeley, California, specializing in science-driven solutions for human and planetary health challenges, recently revealed the successful raising of $50 million in new funds. This includes the $35 million Fund Two and the $15 million Opportunity Fund. With this, their total assets under management have reached $90 million, including the previous $25 million Fund One and $15 million from SPVs. Despite a tough VC market, Freeflow managed to double its fundraising from Fund One to Fund Two.

INMOTION's Challenger Electric Unicycle wins Red Dot Award in Germany for design excellence.
news.summary: In ESSEN, Germany on June 28, 2024, INMOTION, a leader in personal transportation, proudly shared exciting news about their Challenger Electric Unicycle. The product has achieved great recognition by winning the acclaimed Red Dot Award, along with the prestigious "Best of the Best" title for its revolutionary design. This marks a significant achievement for the company, highlighting their commitment to pushing boundaries in personal mobility.

As a leading global publisher, BLG is known for distributing a wide array of theatrical works. The partnership, introduced during Pride Month, showcases a commitment to diversity and artistic contributions.

news.headline: USRA appoints Dr. Walter S. Kiefer as Director of LPI after a national search. He was the Associate Director.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, the Universities Space Research Association (USRA) announced the appointment of Dr. Walter S. Kiefer as the new Director of the Lunar and Planetary Institute (LPI). Dr. Kiefer assumed the position on June 24, 2024, after a thorough national search process. He brings with him experience from his previous role as the Associate Director at LPI. This transition marks a significant development in the organization's leadership, signaling a new chapter under Dr. Kiefer's direction.

news.headline: iFoto introduces AI clothes changer for instant outfit generation based on user description. Revolutionary tech launched on June 28, 2024.
news.summary: Quickly switch outfits with iFoto's AI clothing changing feature. This innovative tool can generate new clothing options based on your description instantly. Recently unveiled by iFoto, a leading provider of image enhancement solutions, this cutting-edge technology is set to revolutionize the way we dress. The launch took place in Hong Kong on June 28, 2024.

There is a growing preference among investors for former President Trump, although his policies are not guaranteed to have a significant impact. Trump's strong performance in the debate has led to a lift in the S&P 500 index, while discussions about Biden potentially exiting the race are circulating. The company's market value is expected to reach [insert value] as a result of this development. news.headline: European regulators rejected PTC Therapeutics' drug for Duchenne muscular dystrophy, leading to a tumble in shares.
news.summary: European regulatory authorities have once again rejected PTC Therapeutics' drug for Duchenne muscular dystrophy, causing a significant drop in PTC's stock value on Friday. This latest setback continues the company's troubled journey with a series of rejections. The rejection led to shares tumbling, reflecting investor concern.

news.headline: Amazon reaches $2 trillion market cap under CEO Andy Jassy, with cost-cutting strategies driving stock to record highs.
news.summary: Following a turbulent three-year period as Amazon's CEO, Andy Jassy's focus on reducing expenses and enhancing services has propelled the company's stock to reach record highs. With Amazon's market value surpassing $2 trillion under Jassy's leadership, investors are now contemplating the company's next steps.

news.summary: Leeanna Morgan, a bestselling author, utilized ElevenLabs' AI voice technology to transform her novels into audiobooks. This move has led to a notable increase in sales for Morgan.

news.headline: Will Smith to perform new single "You Can Make It" featuring Fridayy and Sunday Service Choir at 2024 BET Awards, returning to music scene after Bad Boys premiere.
news.summary: Will Smith is set to perform his latest single at the 2024 BET Awards, featuring Fridayy and Sunday Service Choir. Following the success of "Bad Boys: Ride or Die," the actor and musician will showcase his new music. The event will take place in Los Angeles on June 28, 2024.

news.headline: Denali Therapeutics (NASDAQ: DNLI) stock up 11.9% past 3 months vs industry's 6% drop due to positive updates. FDA selects DNL126 for rare disease clinical trials.
news.summary: Denali Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: DNLI) has seen a strong performance in 2024, with shares rising 11.9% in the past three months, while the industry declined by 6%. The company is focused on developing treatments for neurodegenerative and lysosomal storage diseases by creating products that can cross the blood-brain barrier. The recent positive updates include the FDA selecting their experimental candidate, DNL126, for the START Pilot Program for rare disease therapeutics. DNL126 is an investigational enzyme replacement therapy for MPS IIIA. The company is currently conducting a phase I/II study on the candidate and expects increased engagement from the FDA to support the development path for a marketing application. The START Pilot program aims to accelerate drug development for rare diseases and support the significant unmet medical needs in this area.

news.headline: Lifetime Brands (LCUT) stock surged by 5.9% to $8.62 on high volume, contrasting with a 24.4% loss in the past month on strategic initiatives and Asia Pacific expansion.
news.summary: Shares of Lifetime Brands (NASDAQ: LCUT) surged 5.9% to $8.62 in the latest trading session, supported by heavy trading volume. The stock has recovered slightly after a 24.4% decline in the past month. The company's focus on operational excellence and cost management has fueled investor optimism, leading to strong sell-through rates and continued popularity of its product offerings. Expansion into the Asia Pacific region is expected to drive further growth for Lifetime Brands.

news.headline: SOL ETF leads with 148 FOMO Hour, ADA & XRP won't get it. SOL price could surge 8.9x with ETF. BTC activity at decade low.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency SOL is leading other major cryptocurrencies as investment firm Van Eck files for an exchange-traded fund (ETF) related to SOL. Additionally, Bitwise has suggested the possibility of a SOL ETF filing. According to GSR, SOL is likely to receive an ETF, while ADA and XRP are not. GSR predicts that the price of SOL could potentially increase by a significant 8.9 times with the introduction of an ETF. In other news, popular platforms Coinbase and Stripe are collaborating to facilitate user onboarding processes. The selling pressure from Bitcoin miners has weakened, and BTC activity has dropped to its lowest level in a decade. Steve Cohen has decided to close the cryptocurrency division of his hedge fund. Interestingly, crypto was not discussed during the Presidential debate. On a separate note, the co-founder of Kraken has donated $1 million to Donald Trump. Bolivia has lifted its ban on Bitcoin, allowing its usage in the country. Additionally, MegaLabs has successfully raised $20 million in funding and aims to achieve a transaction speed of 100,000 transactions per second.

news.headline: Inflation data shows Fed policy is effective, too early to lower interest rates, says Daly.
news.summary: Recent inflation figures indicate that determining the appropriate timing for the Federal Reserve to decrease interest rates remains uncertain. Mary Daly, President of the Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco, discussed this matter with CNBC following the release of the latest consumer spending update by the Commerce Department. Bloomberg reported Daly's comments, highlighting the complexity of assessing the effectiveness of monetary policy. According to Daly, it is difficult to find a domain where monetary policy is not influencing outcomes. For additional details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Economists support Fed rate cut as inflation drops to 2.6% in May 2024, lowest since 2021, signaling progress. Market predicts 52 basis point cut by Dec, with 68% probability of 1st cut in Sept.
news.summary: Economists view the latest PCE price index data positively, as it dropped to a 2.6% year-on-year rate in May 2024, the lowest since March 2021. This indicates progress towards the Federal Reserve's 2% inflation target and opens the possibility of interest rate cuts. The futures market predicts a 52 basis point reduction in the fed funds rate by December 2024, with a 68% chance of the first cut as early as September. Chief market strategist James Thorne criticizes the Fed for reacting slowly to data and anticipates they will be late in adjusting rates.

news.headline: Teleflex (NYSE: TFX) set for expansion in Interventional business, with 15.4% revenue growth. Stock down 11.8% past year. Market cap $9.42 billion.
news.summary: Teleflex (NYSE: TFX) is looking to expand in the near future, with a strong focus on its Interventional business. The company is aiming to increase market share by introducing new products in Central Venous Catheters and midlines categories. Despite macroeconomic challenges impacting operations, its solid financial standing is a positive. However, competitive pressures could hinder growth. Over the past year, the stock has declined by 11.8%, with a market capitalization of $9.42 billion. Teleflex has consistently beaten estimates, with an average earnings surprise of 6.5%. The Interventional segment saw a 15.4% revenue growth in Q1 2024, driven by products like balloon pumps and MANTA. The company recently expanded its Structural Heart portfolio with Wattson Temporary Pacing Guidewire and plans to launch Ringer Catheter in late 2024.

news.headline: Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) increases earnings estimates, plans to invest $43 billion by 2029 in infrastructure and renewable projects. Good investment choice.
news.summary: Dominion Energy Inc.'s earnings estimates have been revised upwards, with a projected 38.2% increase in 2024 and 22.9% in 2025. The company reported a 7.84% positive earnings surprise in the last quarter. Dominion plans to invest $43 billion in projects from 2025-2029 to upgrade infrastructure and serve its expanding customer base. They aim to add 24GW of renewable energy projects by 2036. This has led to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) rating, making Dominion Energy an attractive investment opportunity. The full article is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: After first debate, Donald Trump's election odds surge to 64% on Polymarket. $193 million wagered, $23 million on Trump, $22 million on Biden. Biden's campaign doubted.
news.summary: Following the initial 2024 election debate, blockchain bettors are expressing doubt regarding President Joe Biden's performance, as Donald Trump's chances of winning in November have increased to 64%. Currently, a total of $193 million is at stake on the election outcome, with $23 million placed on Trump and $22 million on Biden through bets on Polymarket. These bets are facilitated by smart contracts on the Polygon blockchain and settled in USDC stablecoin. Coindesk noted that the platform faced a temporary outage at the start of the debate due to a surge in traffic. Market sentiment is increasingly questioning Biden's capability to sustain his campaign until the election.

The announcement was made at 5:45 pm CEST. PHAXIAM's stock is listed on Euronext under the symbol PHXM (FR0011471135).

news.headline: Court ruling of June 20, 2024 confirmed acquisition of land plot in Vilnius by „Vingio turtas“, UAB, part of Akropolis Group, UAB after challenge from claimants.
news.summary: The Vilnius Regional Court's decision on June 20, 2024, has now been finalized in a civil case review. The case involved a challenge to the acquisition deal of a land parcel by "Vingio turtas", UAB, a subsidiary of AKROPOLIS GROUP, UAB, indirectly owned. The transaction took place on November 4, 2005, for a land area in Vilnius Vilkpede neighborhood at Gelezinio Vilko str. 2, Vilnius. This land is intended for the development of the Akropolis Vingis multi-functional complex. The claimants questioned the validity of a portion of the state land sale agreement, alleging a violation of their ownership rights restoration.

The main focus was on the pressing need for formal recognition of Hinduphobia. The event highlighted the importance of initiatives such as H.Res 1131. It emphasized the significance of addressing issues related to discrimination and prejudice against Hindus. The event attracted a significant turnout, with key individuals advocating for greater awareness and action regarding this important matter.

news.summary: In May 2024, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority witnessed a significant drop of 16.1% in mortgage applications, yet there was a noteworthy 8.8% boost in approved mortgage loans during the same period.

news.headline: Pierre Fabre Labs receives European marketing approval for OBGEMSA™ (vibegron) for overactive bladder in adults.
news.summary: In CASTRES, France, on June 28, 2024, the European Commission gave the green light for Pierre Fabre Laboratories to market OBGEMSA™ (vibegron) for treating overactive bladder syndrome in adults. This condition is known to impact 70 or more individuals, causing significant distress.

news.headline: C40 Food Systems wins $2 million award for shifting millions of meals to be healthier and sustainable in major cities.
news.summary: The prestigious Food Planet Prize, the world's largest environmental award, was presented to C40 Food Systems, a leading global network, by the Curt Bergfors Foundation on June 28, 2024, in Stockholm, Sweden. This significant achievement showcases their outstanding contributions in sustainability and food systems.

news.headline: QIAGEN supports AAP guidelines recommending QFT-Plus test for TB screening in all children; 13 million Americans may have latent TB.
news.summary: QIAGEN N.V. praises new US guidelines advocating for screening at-risk children for latent tuberculosis with QuantiFERON-TB Gold Plus. American Academy of Pediatrics' updated guidelines cover children of all ages, including infants. TB cases have surged post-COVID-19, with an estimated 13 million latent TB infections in the US. Children are at risk for progression to active TB. IGRAs are preferred over tuberculin skin tests. QIAGEN aims for QFT-Plus to be the gold standard for blood-based TB detection.
